description: This webinar hosted by Illalaro from Binance discusses how to identify crypto scams and protect oneself from fraud. Participants can win up to £10,000 in BNB rewards by completing a quiz after the session.
topic_summary: The session covers the definition of scams, the rise of crypto scams, common types of scams, and how to enhance security against them. It emphasizes the importance of education in safeguarding newcomers to the crypto industry. [t=0:32] [t=41:18] [t=328:93]
